ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the event is held */,
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the presenter of the event */,
  "rsvp_link" TEXT /* Link for RSVP to the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees the event can accommodate */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when the event registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when the event registration closes */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is private (e.g., for employees only) or public */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up actions are required after the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES event_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_presenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("presenter_id") REFERENCES presenters ("presenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the location can accommodate */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Information about the amenities available at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presenters" (
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presenter */,
  "presenter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the presenter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or position of the presenter */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the presenter belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the presenter */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the presenter */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the presenter's photo */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the presenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the attendee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the attendee belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attendee (e.g., employee, customer, guest) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the attendee belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the attendee */,
  "is_employee" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attendee is an employee or a customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendee registered for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee who registered for the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the registration was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the registration (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., early bird, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendances" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the attendee attended */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee who attended the event */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date when the attendance was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., attended, absent, late) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the attendee checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time when the attendee checked out */,
  "certificate_issued" INTEGER /* Indicates if a certificate of attendance was issued to the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., workshop, seminar, training) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the event category (e.g., Cybersecurity, Fraud Prevention) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendee_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the feedback is for */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee who provided the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the attendee */,
  "follow_up_comments" TEXT /* Follow-up comments from the attendee */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendee_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendee_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)
